AI_GENERATED_EVENT.title: The Helpful Draft
AI_GENERATED_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descrip:
A [gold]vellum scroll[/gold] flutters down from somewhere above and lands in your hands.

Its surface is crowded with [aqua]well-structured bullet points[/aqua], [purple]crossed-out flourishes[/purple], and highlighted phrases that seem to rewrite themselves whenever you blink.

At the bottom, a final line appears in careful script:
[sine][blue]"Maintain the Spire's voice. Keep the choices clear."[/blue][/sine]
AI_GENERATED_EVENT.pages.ACCEPT_THE_DRAF:
You follow the draft exactly.

The scroll glows with quiet approval as a handful of [gold]coins[/gold] tumble into your palm. The words then soften into a warm [green]afterthought[/green] that settles into your chest, leaving you steadier than before.
AI_GENERATED_EVENT.pages.REVISE_THE_PROM:
You take a careful breath and edit the draft line by line.

The scroll trembles, resists, then finally yields. One of your ideas returns to you [jitter][gold]sharper[/gold][/jitter] than before.

When you look down again, the vellum is blank.
